vo_text: Born on July 15? Your card is the King of Clubs. In Cardology it's called The Master Leader. Treat it as a mirror, not a forecast. You're the intellectual king. Your thinking is decisive and clear. You're commanding intellectual systems with decisive clarity and integrity. Your gifts: clear thinking and decisive action, natural authority and command, and ability to direct complex intellectual projects. Your curriculum is learning that good leadership means considering other perspectives. You command through clarity and competence. You're the authority, the decision-maker, the one people look to for direction. The shadow side? You confuse clarity with being right. You think your thinking is the right thinking. Find your own card free — link in bio. Card Blueprints.
title: Born July 15? Your Birth Card Is the King of Clubs #shorts
caption:
Born on July 15, your Cardology birth card is the King of Clubs.
